channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Debate emerges over whether modern protections could have saved Baltimore bridge
item.description: When a 900-foot container ship struck the San Francisco–Oakland Bay Bridge in 2007, the span stood firm and no one died, either on the ship or the highway above. The bridge's supports were protected by a fendering system of concrete and other materials that was installed to absorb such strikes.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: TikTok is under investigation by the FTC over data practices and could face a lawsuit
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Federal Trade Commission is investigating TikTok over its data and security practices, a probe that could lead to a settlement or a lawsuit against the company, according to a person familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Beware the gap between security readiness and confidence levels, Cisco warns
item.description: Security readiness among enterprises has dropped in the past year, while the confidence level of many organizations is up – a trend that doesn’t portend a good outcome.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cisco: AI tools, better workspaces would boost in-office appeal
item.description: With hybrid work becoming the norm, advanced software tools are key to getting employees more enthusiastic about in-office work.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI death prediction researchers warn of copycats
item.description: The Life2vec AI Chatbot was revealed late last year, but remains private and unavailable to the public, according to a report from Metro.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Hallow prayer app co-founder says app's success is a 'blessing'
item.description: With 18.5 million downloads and 473 million prayers, CEO Alex Jones said he hopes the app reaches people who have “fallen away.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Dutch hyperloop center aims to advance futuristic transport technology
item.description: VEENDAM, Netherlands (AP) — A 420-meter (quarter-mile) white steel tube running alongside a railway line in the windswept northern Netherlands could usher in a new era in the transportation of people and freight.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CORDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: HPE Aruba adds genAI search tools to network management platform
item.description: HPE Aruba is deploying genAI-driven search tools in its management platform to help customers access detailed responses to queries about network configurations, documentation, and other IT operational issues.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: US and UK go after Chinese hackers accused of state-backed operation against politicians, dissidents
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Hackers linked to the Chinese government launched a sweeping, state-backed operation that targeted U.S. officials, journalists, corporations, pro-democracy activists and the U.K.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
